title: Investigation Workspace
description: The Investigation workspace provides a canvas for exploring a specific clinical question. Build queries, run analyses, annotate findings, and track the evolution of your hypothesis in a single organized view.
tips: Use the Query Builder panel to construct OMOP-based cohort queries directly within your investigation.
Add analyses from the Analyses panel to run incidence rate, characterization, or pathway studies on your cohort.
Annotate cells with free-text notes to capture your interpretation alongside the data.
Save your investigation regularly — snapshots let you restore prior states if your hypothesis evolves.
